note: Credible national/international outlets approved for team-story sourcing (decision D). Outlets not listed use provider/outlet 'other' and REQUIRE a reviewer note. Membership check is case-insensitive on the outlet string.

policy.press_is_discovery: Press/media outlets are source_tier=discovery + verification=attributed_context_only (attributed reporting only). Only FIFA / confederation (UEFA, CONMEBOL, CONCACAF, AFC, CAF, OFC) / national federations are source_tier=official + verification=fact_grade.

guidance: This list is a floor, not a ceiling. For nations without a strong national press here (verify carefully, esp. smaller federations), use the recognized national broadcaster + the major newspaper's sport section, tag as 'other', and add a reviewer note naming the outlet and why it is credible. When in doubt, exclude and record the gap in the file's gaps[].
